title: Why Reddit AutoModerator Instantly Removes Posts
pain_points: Writing a 1,000 word post only for it to be deleted in 0.5 seconds
Not knowing which word triggered the spam filter
solution_summary: AutoModerators use hidden YAML regex scripts to instantly delete posts containing marketing buzzwords. SubSafe simulates these scripts so you can remove the triggers before you ever click 'Submit'.

faq.question: How do I bypass the Reddit spam filter?
faq.answer: By removing promotional trigger words (like 'discount', 'buy now', or 'my startup') and ensuring you meet the subreddit's hidden karma minimums.

faq.question: Does AutoMod tell you why you were removed?
faq.answer: Usually, no. It issues a silent 'removed' tag. SubSafe highlights the exact string of text that is mathematically likely to trigger the YAML gates.

title: Diagnose and Prevent Reddit Account Shadowbans
pain_points: Your posts are stuck at exactly 1 upvote for days
Your profile link goes to a 'User Not Found' page
solution_summary: Reddit silently mutes accounts that post links too frequently across multiple subreddits. SubSafe monitors your posting velocity and warns you before you cross the shadowban threshold.

faq.question: What is a Reddit shadowban?
faq.answer: A silent ban where you can still log in and post, but your content is completely invisible to all other users on the platform.

faq.question: Can I recover a shadowbanned account?
faq.answer: Yes, through the official reddit.com/appeals process, but the best strategy is proactive prevention by monitoring your promotional velocity.

title: Preventing Reddit IP Bans
pain_points: Agencies destroying multiple client campaigns simultaneously
Losing years of account history in seconds
solution_summary: Reddit IP bans are devastating and often permanent. SubSafe proactively warns you about velocity limits and account tethering risks before your network gets flagged by the global spam algorithm.

faq.question: What triggers a Reddit IP ban?
faq.answer: Using the same IP to upvote your own content across multiple accounts, or posting identical promotional links simultaneously from a single network.

title: Bypassing Low Karma Limits
primary_keyword: how to get reddit karma fast
pain_points: Waiting 30 days and grinding 500 karma just to post a single marketing message
Buying fake accounts that immediately get shadowbanned
Wasting time commenting manually to build required comment karma
solution_summary: Karma walls are the most frustrating barrier for new marketers. SubSafe guides you in identifying the exact hidden karma thresholds for your target subreddits so you know precisely when it's safe to engage.

faq.question: How much karma do I need to post on Reddit?
faq.answer: It varies from 10 to 500+. SubSafe helps you decipher the exact AutoModerator requirements before you waste a launch.
